title: Luster
description: A 16x resource pack with calm and immersive ambience. No mods required. PBR compatible.
body:
## Features
_This pack is work in progress, still major items and blocks are almost completed._

Exploring with this pack will give you a fresh feel. Also there are lots of blocks that enhance your building.
- LabPBR format (Reflections, Normal maps, Height maps, Emissions)
- 16x Resolution, similar to vanilla's ambience
- Most blocks are applied textures and some of them have low res PBR
- Animated textures
- Doubled slabs turn into different texture
- 3D item models (After MC1.21.4)

Plans for future updates
- Add textures for all blocks, items and mobs
- Improve textures
- Apply to latest minecraft versions

## Requirements
- No mods needed.
- Shaders with labPBR support makes your world look better. Without it, this pack totally works.
## Terms
**You can:**
- Upload in-game videos or screenshots on any media. Then, please put the name of this pack and its download link in the description.
- Modify files **only for personal use**.

**You cannot:**
- Redistribute this pack **regardless of whether files are edited or not**.
- Claim this pack as your own.
- Use my work for commercial purposes.
- Upload a work that include the assets of this pack.

The only official page is here, modrinth. Please note that any other source may not be safe. 
Thank you, have fun!
